name: Potato Crisps with Sour Cream and Caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes using a grater or food processor.
2. Add chives, parsley, salt, and pepper to the grated potatoes. Do not soak the potatoes, as starch will be lost.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet until hot.
4. For each crisp, drop about 1/4 cup of potato mixture into the oil.
5. Flatten the potato mixture slightly.
6. Fry on one side until crispy, about 2 minutes.
7. Flip and fry on the second side until crispy again.
8. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Repeat steps 3-8 until all potato mixture is used up.
10. At serving time, reheat the crisps in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes or serve cold.
11. Garnish with sour cream, caviar, and a sprinkling of chives.
